description: Lock Storage Amphorae to ceramic storage and transport containers tied to preservation and trade routes, not market-square institutions.

checks.reason: The broad storage-amphora node remains anchored to its ancient date.
Trade routes are the corrected exchange and transport context.
The jar form is linked to stored goods moving through exchange networks.
Preserved food and liquid-storage contents remain part of the broad node scope.
Market squares are broader retail/civic venues and should not be restored as a direct prerequisite for the container technology.
